note:
Again, great start. Also looks a little too similar to the others, with the exact same table format, so that table, the template redesign, will help. One important thing I want to call out is that here I think we're going to want different templates to test. I think that we want to also try some stuff with social proof, where it's saying, "Hey, others have purchased moments from X player." That's both personalized and social proof.

In general, you should really emphasize much more social proof in the emails that we're sending, what others are doing, what is happening elsewhere on the platform, and then you have access to all that data, so pull it and use it completely.
